title: June 22
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}

'''June 22''' is the 173rd day of the year (174th in leap years). There are 192 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1936|1936]] – [[John Korty]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[C. Andrew Nelson]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Edvin Biuković]] is born.
*[[1974]] – [[Donald Faison]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Wayne Nichols]] is born.
*[[1982]] – [[Alan Webb]] dies.
*[[1983]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 1|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 1]] published.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 105|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 105]] published.
*[[1997]] – [[Don Henderson]] dies.
*[[2006]] – "[[Evil Never Dies: The Sith Dynasties]]" published on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[2011]] – [[Jedi—The Dark Side 2|''Jedi—The Dark Side'' 2]] published.
*[[2016]] – "[[Zander's Joyride]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*2016 – [[The Force Awakens Adaptation 1|''The Force Awakens Adaptation'' 1]] published.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Vader Vol. 2 — Into the Fire]]'' published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Insider 203|''Star Wars Insider'' 203]] published.
*2021 – ''[[Chewbacca and Other Aliens of the Rebellion and the Resistance]]'' published in [[Wikipedia:Spanish language|Spanish]].
*2021 – "[[Star Wars Inside Intel: Clone Armor|''Star Wars'' Inside Intel: Clone Armor]]" published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2022]] – [[Crimson Reign 5|''Crimson Reign'' 5]] published.
*2022 – "[[Part VI]]" episode of [[Star Wars: Obi-Wan Kenobi|''Obi-Wan Kenobi'']] released.
